role_title: Strategy & Operations Associate Manager - Ads & Promotions Supply

level_signals: Reports into a Manager (not a Director), suggesting mid-level
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base consistent with mid-senior individual contributor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in consulting, ads strategy, product operations, ad tech, and/or brand management; prior CPG experience a plus
must_haves.domain: consulting / ads strategy / product operations / ad tech / brand management

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working with Product, Data Science, Sales, and/or Engineering teams
A proven track record of leading projects, working cross-functionally, and managing against ambitious goals
Excellent analytical abilities (proficiency in SQL required)

scope.surface: CPG Ads formats and inventory; retail media network supply strategy across DoorDash's highest-impact advertising surfaces
scope.business_model: retail media network / advertising (B2B CPG advertisers reaching DoorDash consumers)
primary_metrics_inferred: Auction dynamics and marketplace competition health
core_responsibilities: Strategy development and execution for net new sellable inventory: identify the biggest untapped opportunities that can unblock ads supply and drive growth for DoorDash and advertisers' businesses.
Yield management / inventory optimization: identify where we have supply gaps and implement tactical initiatives to increase ad supply while protecting overall DoorDash metrics.
Marketplace competition & selection: Identify whitespace opportunities to strengthen auction dynamics and partner cross-functionally to further optimize demand growth.

green_flags: Equity grants included in compensation package
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Clear reporting structure (reports to Manager of Ads Supply on CPG team)
Well-defined core responsibilities with three distinct workstreams
Fast-growing team and business area (retail media network)
red_flags: Work location type is ambiguous — JD mentions NYC-specific AEDT notice and remote context but does not clearly state whether this role is remote, hybrid, or onsite
No explicit mention of team size or direct reports structure beyond reporting line

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Associate Manager', reporting structure, years required, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description of retail media network)
location.work_auth (inferred as open based on absence of restriction language)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from statement 'Base salary is localized according to an employee's work location')
ambiguities: Work location type is unclear: JD references NYC-specific hiring notice and 'Remote Jobs Associated With Office in NYC' but does not explicitly state the role's location type (remote/hybrid/onsite). Could be hybrid NYC or remote-eligible.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD.

The '4+ years' requirement lists CPG experience as 'a plus' within the same sentence as the hard requirement — CPG has been classified as a nice-to-have per the 'a plus' qualifier, while the rest of the requirement is hard.
